name: Quick Broccoli & Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pk Frozen Broccoli With-Cheese Sauce
1 cup Cooked Chicken, Ham or Turkey - Cubed
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Cooking times are based on the use of a 625-750 watt microwave oven and food quantities for 2 servings. Adjust cooking times as required.
Follow package directions for frozen Broccoli with-Cheese Sauce. Transfer to a (1 Qt.) casserole dish. Add the chicken, ham or turkey. Add the rice, milk and cheese. Mix thoroughly. Cover. Microwave on high until the rice is tender (about 6 minutes), stirring once. Serve.
